content: Awọn ilana Hargrove-Mendelssohn ti o da lori iwọn didun spectral washout ti o kere ju 0.8 jẹ pataki fun awọn anticoagulants ti o ni ipa lori awọn ifosiwewe coagulation bii warfarin, kii ṣe fun apixaban. Fun apixaban, awọn ilana perioperative ko lo iwọn didun spectral washout bi itọkasi, nitori ipa rẹ lori coagulation ko ni ibamu pẹlu awọn wiwọn wọnyẹn. Nitorinaa, ilana yii wulo nikan fun awọn aṣoju kilasi warfarin, kii ṣe fun apixaban.
